name: West Mokoan Solar Farm and BESS

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2029-07 to 2029-07-02 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: Pre-FID at 19 months post-award. Lightsource bp seeking new consolidated planning approval; targeted FC Q3 2026, construction Q4 2026, ops Q3 2028.

sources.title: Coordinates hand-curated for Mansfield Regional Pipeline map (v3.10.0)
sources.note: Placename centroid — West Mokoan (west of Mokoan reservoir). Sub-10km precision sufficient for 100km-radius regional view.

operational_notes: Owned by Lightsource bp (bp's renewable arm). CIS T1 award covers 300 MW solar + 560 MWh BESS (T1 scope). Full project includes larger BESS scope (1,568 MWh total per AEMO Gen Info). Seeking new consolidated planning approval Jul 2026; targeted timeline FC Q3 2026, construction Q4 2026, ops Q3 2028.
